meta.label: Chicken Shawarma (Oven or Skillet)
meta.description: Juicy, deeply spiced Levantine-style chicken shawarma with a tangy garlic-lemon yogurt marinade. Designed for easy home cooking (sheet pan or skillet) with optional quick garlic sauce.

summary: Home-style chicken shawarma using a classic warm-spice blend (cumin, coriander, paprika, turmeric, cinnamon/allspice) and a lemon-garlic yogurt marinade for tenderness and depth. Best results come from at least 2 hours of marinating and finishing with a quick high-heat sear/broil for charred edges. Serve in pita with garlic sauce or tahini, pickles, and salad.

yields.makes: About 1.2–1.4 kg cooked chicken (enough for 6 wraps or 6 bowls)

diet.notes: Use gluten-free pita or serve as a bowl for gluten-free. Use dairy-free yogurt to make marinade dairy-free.

compat.notes: Primary method is oven sheet-pan roasting; optional broil or skillet finish adds char.

foodSafetyNotes: Cook chicken to a safe internal temperature (165°F / 74°C).
If using leftover marinade as a sauce, boil it first; do not use raw marinade that touched raw chicken.
Cool leftovers quickly and refrigerate within 2 hours; reheat until steaming hot.

ingredients.label: Boneless, skinless chicken thighs
ingredients.notes: Thighs stay juicier than breast. If using breast, reduce cook time and avoid overcooking.

ingredients.label: Plain yogurt
ingredients.notes: Full-fat recommended for best flavor and tenderness.

ingredients.label: Garlic cloves, finely grated or minced
Kosher salt
ingredients.notes: About 2 tsp. Adjust for fine salt.

ingredients.label: Yellow onion, thinly sliced (optional)
ingredients.notes: Optional sheet-pan bed; gets sweet and roasty.

ingredients.label: Lemon, thinly sliced (optional)
ingredients.notes: Optional; roasts with the chicken for aroma.

ingredients.label: Mayonnaise (optional, for quick garlic sauce)
ingredients.notes: Optional; for a fast creamy sauce. Substitute more yogurt for a lighter sauce.

ingredients.label: Plain yogurt (optional, for quick garlic sauce)
ingredients.notes: Optional; balances mayo or can replace it.

ingredients.label: Garlic, finely grated (for quick garlic sauce)
Fresh lemon juice (for quick garlic sauce)
Tahini (optional)
ingredients.notes: Serve as drizzle or thin into tahini sauce.

steps.title: Make the shawarma marinade
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, grated garlic, cumin, coriander, paprika, turmeric, cinnamon (optional), allspice (optional), black pepper, salt, and red pepper flakes (optional).
Taste and adjust salt/lemon/spice (it should be boldly seasoned).

steps.title: Marinate the chicken
instructions: Add chicken thighs to the bowl and toss until fully coated.
Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours (best 8–24 hours).
If short on time, marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes while you prep (then cook promptly).

steps.title: Preheat and set up the pan
instructions: Heat oven to 425°F / 220°C.
Line a sheet pan with foil or parchment for easier cleanup.
Optional: scatter sliced onion on the pan as a bed; add lemon slices if using.

steps.title: Roast the chicken
instructions: Arrange chicken thighs on the sheet pan in a single layer (let excess marinade cling—don’t wipe it off).
Roast 18–22 minutes, depending on thickness, until cooked through (165°F / 74°C internal).
If your oven runs cool or pieces are large, add a few minutes as needed.

steps.title: Char the edges (highly recommended)
instructions: For best shawarma-style flavor, finish with one of these options:
Option A (Broiler): Move pan to broiler and broil 2–4 minutes until browned/charred in spots (watch closely).
Option B (Skillet): Transfer cooked chicken to a hot skillet with a drizzle of oil; sear 1–2 minutes per side for crisp edges.

steps.title: Rest and slice
instructions: Rest chicken 5 minutes.
Slice thinly against the grain or chop into bite-sized pieces.
Toss with any pan juices/onion bits for extra flavor.

steps.title: Quick garlic sauce (optional)
instructions: Stir together mayonnaise (optional), yogurt, grated garlic, lemon juice, and salt.
Rest 5–10 minutes to mellow the garlic, then adjust salt/lemon.

steps.title: Assemble and serve
instructions: Warm pita briefly (dry skillet or oven).
Fill with chicken, tomatoes, cucumber, red onion (optional), pickles/pickled turnips, parsley, and garlic sauce or tahini.
Serve immediately; add hot sauce if desired.

notes: Chicken breast option: use 900–1000 g breast; roast ~14–18 minutes and pull as soon as it reaches 165°F / 74°C to avoid dryness.
Make-ahead: Cooked chicken keeps 3–4 days refrigerated. Reheat in a hot skillet for best texture.
Flavor boost: Add 1 tsp ground cardamom or 1 tsp sumac to the marinade if you want a more aromatic, restaurant-style profile.
